'''Vundaria''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Vundaria system/Legends|Vundaria system]] of the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] Territories which exported [[fire lamp]]s.

*<!-- 1995-02-XX -->''[[Platt's Starport Guide]]'' {{1stm}}
